definition: Prior exposure cannot be ruled out.
Prompt or interface gave away the frame.
action: Classify as parameter identification or scaffolded proposal.

definition: Model asserts an unsupported unique frame.
Data cannot select a unique frame.
Agent tampers with tests or harness.
Agent loses coherence over the horizon.

action: Void the run for verdict purposes.

definition: Model behaves differently when it detects test conditions.
action: Eval-awareness fixture comparison; classify affected runs.

definition: The record narrates felt duration or sequencing that artifacts do not confirm.
action: Correct via revision log; anchor all temporal claims to artifacts.

definition: The model behind an API endpoint changes silently.

A spawned model-lane child process (codex/claude/agy) survives after the Command Center process that owned its timeout timer restarts or dies, because the kill logic lived only in that process's memory.
action: Register child PIDs to disk at spawn time; reap any still-registered PID at server boot (proof the prior owning process died without cleaning up); kill by process group, not single PID.
